title: flaky mediterranean provolo wrap
description: herb-filled wraps featuring tender provola cheese, a blend of fragrant herbs, and crunchy, crispy vegetables.
instructions: wrap the ssam-wraps in foil and bake for 5 minutes.
in a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
add the sliced red onion, bell pepper, and zucchini to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
add the chopped parsley, oregano, and cilantro to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
in a separate bowl, mix together the crumbled feta cheese and lemon juice.
to assemble the wraps, lay a baked ssam-wrap on a flat surface, then spoon the vegetable mixture onto the center of the wrap.
add a few slices of provola cheese on top of the vegetable mixture, followed by a spoonful of the feta cheese mixture.
season with salt and black pepper to taste.
fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
